data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the scenario of an auto-offer when a cancellation occurs. However, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation of this feature or any related API interactions that confirm its functionality. The linked use cases and prior steps indicate gaps in the necessary triggers and conditions that would support this scenario, leading to a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of auto-offer functionality upon cancellation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for auto-offer on cancellation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system generates an auto-offer when a cancellation event is recorded.
